节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability to manage the datetime of the enterprise devices.
Sets the system time. This function can be called by a super administrator.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the administrator ability information.
@param { number } time - time indicates the target time stamp (ms).
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - the callback of setDateTime.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - the application is not an administrator of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - the application does not have permission to call this function.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.
time indicates the target time stamp (ms).

error_codes.description: the application is not an administrator of the device.
the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
the application does not have permission to call this function.
not system application.
invalid input parameter.

节点.功能描述: Sets the system time. This function can be called by a super administrator.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the administrator ability information.
@param { number } time - time indicates the target time stamp (ms).
@returns { Promise<void> } the promise returned by the setDateTime.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - the application is not an administrator of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - the application does not have permission to call this function.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.
time indicates the target time stamp (ms).

节点.功能描述: Disallow modify the system time. This function can be called by a super administrator.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the administrator ability information.
@param { boolean } disallow - true if the user is not allowed to modify the system time.
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - the callback of disallowModifyDateTime.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - the application is not an administrator of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - the application does not have permission to call this function.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.
true if the user is not allowed to modify the system time.

error_codes.description: the application is not an administrator of the device.
the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
the application does not have permission to call this function.
not system application.
invalid input parameter.

节点.功能描述: Query the capability of modify the system time is allowed or disallowed. This function can be called by a super administrator.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the administrator ability information.
@param { AsyncCallback<boolean> } callback - return true if modify datetime is not allowed.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - the application is not an administrator of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - the application does not have permission to call this function.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.
return true if modify datetime is not allowed.

the application does not have permission to call this function.
